evidence: TASK-030 verified. pi-context pi-bound implemented across 3369b57 (pi-context ./package.json export), 0501fde (pi-bound module + cli.ts dispatch + tests + CHANGELOG), 90c213f (set -e pre-launch failure-handling fix), e7e972d (README docs). Verified: routed in main() before op resolution + excluded from surface:use (pi-bound is not a registered op); the launched --tools surface is the 73-tool union (69 SKILL.md tools byte-identical to the script + builtin read,ls,grep,find) plus config.tool_operations[] composites; meta-root via require.resolve('@davidorex/pi-project-workflows/package.json') + pi install -l <root> spawned FIRST on every launch (resume invariant holds under --continue/-c); context composed in-process via loadContext (no tsx/python3); --grant scopes composites + trailing --grant exits 2 + passthrough forwarded to pi unchanged; all pre-launch setup failures (package-resolve throw, pi install non-zero exit, install spawn-error, launch spawn-error) abort BEFORE launch with pi-context-pi-bound-prefixed messages and deterministic codes (install propagates its own exit code, set -e parity). build + check + full test suite green (pi-context-cli 67/67, fail 0 across all packages); two fresh adversarial probes PASS (the second independently re-auditing the failure-handling fix). Stubbed-spawn runtime demo: install exit 5 -> runPiBound returns 5 with NO launch; install ok -> 2 spawns, 73-tool launch. The real interactive pi session from a registry/global install (criterion 7 live-session aspect + criterion 9) is credentialed + release-gated, deferred.
